title: Shocking New AI Just Hit 12 Million Tokens With 1000x Less Compute
summary: Subquadratic claims its SubQ model achieves 12 million token context windows with 1000x less attention compute than prior approaches using Sparse Attention Architecture (SSA). The model targets enterprise AI by enabling direct reasoning over full documents, codebases, and contracts without chunking or retrieval augmentation.
